# Syed Mohamad Arif — Freelance Mobile App & Web Developer in Malaysia

> Freelance mobile app and web developer based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. 4+ years of experience building React Native, React, and Next.js apps for Malaysian and international clients. Creator of Hikayat Daily Global, Hikayat Diri, and LokalGig.

Last updated: 2026-05-13

## About

Syed Mohamad Arif is a freelance Mobile App and Web Developer in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, specialising in React Native for cross-platform iOS and Android apps and React / Next.js for the web. He works across the full product lifecycle — UI/UX design and prototyping in Figma, development in TypeScript, testing, CI/CD, and store / cloud deployment. Currently a Mobile App Developer at Paywatch Malaysia and available for freelance engagements with Malaysian SMEs, startups, and international clients.

## Quick facts

- Name: Syed Mohamad Arif (also: Syed Arif, syedmhdarif)
- Role: Freelance Mobile App Developer · Frontend Developer · React Native Developer · Web App Developer
- Location: Sentul, Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
- Experience: 4+ years
- Current employer: Paywatch Malaysia
- Languages: English, Bahasa Malaysia
- Currencies invoiced: MYR, USD
- Service area: Malaysia (Kuala Lumpur, Petaling Jaya, Shah Alam, Selangor, Penang, Johor) + worldwide remote
- Notable creations: Hikayat Daily Global, Hikayat Diri, LokalGig
- Available for: freelance / contract web and mobile app development

## Projects (all created by Syed Mohamad Arif)

- LokalGig (https://lokalgig.my) — a Malaysian local services marketplace connecting freelancers with clients; React, TypeScript, Supabase, Vercel. Created and built end-to-end by Syed Mohamad Arif.
- Hikayat Daily Global — daily storytelling Android app on Google Play; React Native, TypeScript, Firebase, Redux.
- Hikayat Diri (Mobile) — Android personal-storytelling companion app; React Native, Expo, TypeScript.
- CitySage — city-guide web application; React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS.
- Interactive Room — interactive 3D web experience; Three.js, React, WebGL.
